arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah issues latest worrying update on Liverpool contract talks
arts.sum: Reds hero will be able to talk to foreign clubs on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Slot drops hint on future of Real Madrid target Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has on Sunday dropped something of a hint, regarding the future of long-time Real Madrid target Trent Alexander-Arnold. The name of defender Alexander-Arnold has of…

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon hits back at Liverpool transfer statement in explosive Newcastle promise
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool FC transfer news as Anthony Gordon reiterates Newcastle United future stance - after his summer saga involving the Reds.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot ignores Jamie Carragher's demand regarding two Liverpool players
arts.sum: Arne Slot led Liverpool to a comprehensive 5-0 win at West Ham to ensure they keep a healthy lead at the top of the Premier League table going into the new year

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot admits he has no control over expiring stars’ futures
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold will be able to enter talks with foreign clubs as of January 1.

arts.ttl: Is Liverpool's new front three even better than Salah, Mane & Firmino?
arts.sum: How do Mohamed Salah, Cody Gakpo and Luis Diaz measure up against Liverpool's last title-winning front three?

arts.ttl: Salah 'far away' from new deal with Liverpool
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah said he is still "far away" from resolving his future at Liverpool after scoring once and creating two more goals in a 5-0 win at West Ham that moved Arne Slot's team eight points clear at the top of the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot provides an update on Joe Gomez after the defender suffered a hamstring injury in Liverpool's 5-0 win over West Ham
arts.sum: The first-half injury to the versatile defender, who has deputised brilliantly in the absence of Ibrahima Konate , was the only blemish on a perfect night for the Reds in London.

arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp hails 'phenomenal' Mohamed Salah as the Liverpool star scores and provides two assists in 5-0 thrashing of West Ham
arts.sum: Salah continued his excellent campaign as he scored and provided two assists during his side's comprehensive victory at London Stadium.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's success this season could depend on the futures of their star players
arts.sum: Liverpool will enter 2025 top of the Premier League table, but will also deal with the uncertainty of the futures of several of their star players.
